title: Some users may encounter an error when using the Microsoft 365 Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook
impact: Users may encounter an error when using the Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook.

updates.content:
Title: Users are seeing an error when using the Copilot rewrite feature in Classic Outlook

User impact: Users are seeing an error when using the Copilot rewrite feature in Classic Outlook.

More info:  Copilot rewrite feature functionality works as expected in Outlook on the web and the new Outlook.

Affected users when selecting text and using the Copilot rewrite option in Classic Outlook, are seeing the following error message  "Sorry, something went wrong. Copilot is working on it."

Current status: We’re reviewing associated support case details to understand more about the issue, and determine our next troubleshooting steps.

Scope of impact: Your organization is affected by this event, and some users attempting to utilize Copilot rewrite feature are impacted.

Next update by: Thursday, June 11, 2026, at 1:30 PM UTC

Title: Some users may encounter an error when using the Copilot rewrite feature in Classic Outlook

User impact: Users may encounter an error when using the Copilot rewrite feature in Classic Outlook.

More info: Copilot rewrite feature functionality works as expected in Outlook on the web and new Outlook.
 
Affected users when selecting text and using the Copilot rewrite option in Classic Outlook, may encounter the following error message  "Sorry, something went wrong. Copilot is working on it."

Current status: We suspect a potential regression in the Outlook client is contributing to the issue and are actively analyzing telemetry data and comparing behaviour across different client versions to determine the source of impact.

Scope of impact: Impact is specific to some users attempting to utilize Copilot rewrite feature in Classic Outlook.

Next update by: Thursday, June 11, 2026, at 3:30 PM UTC

Title: Some users may encounter an error when using the Microsoft 365 Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook

User impact: Users may encounter an error when using the Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook.

More info: Copilot rewrite feature functionality works as expected in Outlook on the web and new Outlook.
 
When affected users select text and use the Copilot rewrite option in classic Outlook, they may encounter the following error message, "Sorry, something went wrong. Copilot is working on it."

Final status: The investigation is complete and we've determined the service is healthy. A service incident didn't actually occur. This communication will expire in 24 hours.

Scope of impact: Impact is specific to some users of the Copilot rewrite feature in classic Outlook.

This is the final update for the event.
